title: Nordson Corporation and Nordson Corporation Foundation Give Nearly $13 million to Charity in Fiscal Year 2022
text: WESTLAKE, Ohio--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Nordson Corporation (Nasdaq: NDSN) and the Nordson Corporation Foundation today announced that they have contributed approximately $13 million to charity during the 2022 fiscal year, which ended October 31, 2022.

title: Nordson (NDSN) Up 0.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Nordson (NDSN) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Nordson Test & Inspection to Demonstrate Best-in-Class Inspection and Metrology Systems at APEX 2023
text: MINNEAPOLIS--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Nordson Test & Inspection today announced that it will exhibit at the 2023 IPC APEX EXPO, scheduled to take place Jan. 24-26, 2023 at the San Diego Convention Center in California. The company will highlight the multi-award-winning CyberOptics SQ3000™+ Multi-Function system for AOI, SPI and CMM, the M2 AOI system, the CyberOptics SE3000™ SPI system and Quadra 7 X-ray system in Booth #915.
